# AUTOVERE

> A calm, intelligent AI advisor that learns how you live and guides you to the few cars worth your attention. Bilingual (English / Norwegian), with deep coverage of the European EV market.

AUTOVERE blends an editorial car magazine with an AI-driven advisor. We focus on real ownership: range in Nordic winters, charging across Europe, family fit, and total cost — not horsepower for its own sake.

## Pages

- [Home](/): The AI advisor, featured cars, and the latest signals.
- [About](/about): Who we are and how the advisor reasons.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Free tier and AUTOVERE Premium.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the editorial team.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about the advisor and data.
- [Help](/help): Guides for getting the most out of AUTOVERE.

## Cars and discovery

- [Discover](/discover): Curated entry point for new visitors.
- [Cars](/cars): Full vehicle catalogue with intelligence cards.
- [Compare](/compare): Side-by-side comparison of any two cars.
- [Collections](/collections): Editor-curated themed lineups.
- [Personalities](/personalities): Cars matched to driver archetypes.
- [Learn](/learn): Long-form guides on ownership and choosing a car.
- [Watch](/watch): Curated video reviews and walkarounds.

## EV intelligence hub

- [EV Hub](/ev): Overview of the EV section.
- [EV Database](/ev/database): Specs for every major EV sold in Europe.
- [EV Models](/ev/models): Detailed model pages with charging, range, and ownership data.
- [EV Reviews](/ev/reviews): Editorial and aggregated reviews.
- [EV News](/ev/news): Daily EV market and policy news.
- [EV Guides](/ev/guides): How-to guides for buying, charging, and living with an EV.
- [EV Charging](/ev/charging): Networks, speeds, and pricing across Europe.
- [Charging Networks](/ev/networks): Per-network detail pages (Ionity, Tesla, Recharge, etc.).
- [Route Planner](/ev/route-planner): Plan EV routes across Europe.
- [EV Calculator](/ev/calculator): Cost, range, and charging-time calculator.
- [EV Compare](/ev/compare): Side-by-side EV comparison.
- [EV Advisor](/ev/advisor): Guided EV recommendation flow.
- [EV Markets](/ev/markets): Country-by-country EV market snapshots.

## Languages

- English: https://www.autovere.com/
- Norsk: https://www.autovere.com/no
